parameters.query: CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS s_buffer;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS s_buffer.channels (
  id VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255),
  service VARCHAR(100),
  organization_id VARCHAR(255),
  active BOOLEAN,
  created_at TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS s_buffer.posts (
  id VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY,
  text TEXT,
  channel_id VARCHAR(255),
  due_at TIMESTAMP,
  status VARCHAR(50),
  assets VARCHAR,
  metrics VARCHAR,
  reactions INTEGER,
  comments INTEGER,
  shares INTEGER,
  reposts INTEGER,
  clicks INTEGER,
  reach INTEGER,
  impressions INTEGER,
  views INTEGER,
  engagement_rate DECIMAL(10,2),
  created_at TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP,
  processed INTEGER
);

INSERT INTO s_buffer.channels (id, name, service, organization_id, active, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ('{{ $json.id }}', '{{ $json.name ? $json.name.replace(/'/g, "''") : "" }}', '{{ $json.service }}', '{{ $json.organization_id }}', {{ $json.active }}, '{{ $json.created_at }}', '{{ $json.updated_at }}')
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
  name = EXCLUDED.name,
  service = EXCLUDED.service,
  organization_id = EXCLUDED.organization_id,
  active = EXCLUDED.active,
  created_at = EXCLUDED.created_at,
  updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at;

INSERT INTO s_buffer.posts (id, text, channel_id, due_at, status, assets, metrics, reactions, comments, shares, reposts, clicks, reach, impressions, views, engagement_rate, created_at, updated_at, processed)
VALUES ('{{ $json.id }}', '{{ $json.text ? $json.text.replace(/'/g, "''") : "" }}', '{{ $json.channel_id }}', '{{ $json.due_at }}', '{{ $json.status }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.assets) }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.metrics) }}', {{ $json.reactions }}, {{ $json.comments }}, {{ $json.shares }}, {{ $json.reposts }}, {{ $json.clicks }}, {{ $json.reach }}, {{ $json.impressions }}, {{ $json.views }}, {{ $json.engagement_rate }}, '{{ $json.created_at }}', '{{ $json.updated_at }}', {{ $json.processed }})
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
  text = EXCLUDED.text,
  channel_id = EXCLUDED.channel_id,
  due_at = EXCLUDED.due_at,
  status = EXCLUDED.status,
  assets = EXCLUDED.assets,
  metrics = EXCLUDED.metrics,
  reactions = EXCLUDED.reactions,
  comments = EXCLUDED.comments,
  shares = EXCLUDED.shares,
  reposts = EXCLUDED.reposts,
  clicks = EXCLUDED.clicks,
  reach = EXCLUDED.reach,
  impressions = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  views = EXCLUDED.views,
  engagement_rate = EXCLUDED.engagement_rate,
  created_at = EXCLUDED.created_at,
  updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at,
  processed = EXCLUDED.processed;
